rulings.Case Title: STERLING HEATLEY, AN INDIVIDUAL VS. SF CORNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Receivers Motion For Order Approving Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receivers Bond And Approving Compensation And Expenses Of Receiver And His Cousel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 1. Receiver's Motion for Order Approving Final Accounting GRANTED. The Final Report and Accounting is approved. Receiver shall be paid $99,760.73 and receiver's counsel shall be paid $63,402.17. The payment shall be made out of Plaintiff's share of the Property, if any, and/or by the Plaintiff. See City of Chula Vista v. Gutierrez (2012) 207 Cal.App.4th 681. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES LIU, M.D. VS. YORK H. LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 2. Motion for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property OFF CALENDAR, per the moving party the motion was re-noticed for September 10, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MOHSIN AHMMED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 3. Cross-Defendant's Demurer to Cross-Complaint Continued to September 30, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint to Department 501 no later than September 11, 2015 with cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 4. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Continued to September 15, 2105 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike By Defendant Anna Kihage To Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 4. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint Continued to September 15, 2105 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD L LAZZARETTO AND CONNIE LAZZARETTO TRUSTEES VS. KATHY RENEE HIRZEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Kathy Renee Hirzel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 5. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1345. Defendant's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $55. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: INAM SHAMI ET AL VS. NENITA QUIJANO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to properly identify in the body of the complaint, label and attach the operative notice and the proof of service for the operative notice in this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. RICKIE CORTEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 7. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2070 BRYANT STREET JV, LLC VS. INNER MISSION SF, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 8. Defendants' Motion for Summary Judgment. Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 31, 2015, line 9. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)
